title: How creator talent agencies are evolving into multi-platform operators
description: The legacy agency model is being re-built from the ground up to better serve the maturing creator economy – here's what that looks like.
summary_ko: 크리에이터 에이전시들이 성숙해지는 크리에이터 이코노미에 맞춰 기존 모델을 완전히 재구축하고 있습니다. 이들은 단순한 인재 관리를 넘어 멀티 플랫폼 운영자로 진화하고 있습니다. 새로운 모델은 크리에이터들의 다양한 플랫폼 활동을 통합적으로 지원합니다.
summary_en: Creator talent agencies are completely rebuilding their legacy models to better serve the maturing creator economy. They are evolving beyond simple talent management into multi-platform operators. The new model provides integrated support for creators' activities across various platforms.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 크리에이터 파트너십 전략을 재평가하고, 진화하는 에이전시 모델과의 협업 방식을 새롭게 정립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands need to reassess their creator partnership strategies and establish new collaboration methods with evolving agency models.
key_points: Creator agencies are rebuilding their business models from the ground up
Evolution from talent management to multi-platform operations
Adaptation to the maturing creator economy landscape

title: ‘The conversation has shifted’: The CFO moved upstream. Now agencies have to as well
description: One interesting side effect of marketing coming under greater scrutiny in the boardroom: CFOs are working more closely with agencies than ever before.
summary_ko: 마케팅이 이사회에서 더 큰 관심을 받으면서 CFO들이 에이전시와 이전보다 훨씬 밀접하게 협력하고 있습니다. 대화의 초점이 변화하면서 CFO가 업스트림으로 이동했습니다. 에이전시들도 이러한 변화에 맞춰 적응해야 하는 상황입니다.
summary_en: As marketing comes under greater boardroom scrutiny, CFOs are working more closely with agencies than ever before. The conversation has shifted with CFOs moving upstream in the decision-making process. Agencies must adapt to this new dynamic and collaboration model.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 마케팅 의사결정에서 재무 관점의 중요성이 증가함에 따라 ROI 측정과 재무 성과 연결을 더욱 강화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies must strengthen ROI measurement and financial performance connections as the financial perspective becomes increasingly important in marketing decisions.
key_points: CFOs are working more closely with agencies due to increased marketing scrutiny
The conversation has shifted with CFOs moving upstream
Agencies need to adapt to new collaboration dynamics

title: Why one brand reimbursed $10,000 to customers who paid its ‘Trump Tariff Surcharge’ last year
description: Sexual wellness company Dame is one of the first brands to proactively return money tied to President Donald Trump’s now-invalidated tariffs.
summary_ko: 성인용품 회사 Dame이 도널드 트럼프의 무효화된 관세와 관련해 고객들에게 1만 달러를 환급했습니다. 이 회사는 작년 '트럼프 관세 할증료'를 지불한 고객들에게 선제적으로 돈을 돌려준 최초의 브랜드 중 하나입니다. 이는 브랜드의 투명성과 고객 중심 접근을 보여주는 사례입니다.
summary_en: Sexual wellness company Dame reimbursed $10,000 to customers related to Donald Trump's now-invalidated tariffs. The company is one of the first brands to proactively return money to customers who paid its 'Trump Tariff Surcharge' last year. This demonstrates the brand's transparency and customer-centric approach.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 정치적 변화나 정책 변경 시 고객과의 신뢰 관계 유지를 위한 선제적 대응 전략을 마련해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should prepare proactive response strategies to maintain customer trust during political changes or policy shifts.
key_points: Dame reimbursed $10,000 to customers for invalidated Trump tariff surcharges
First brand to proactively return tariff-related payments
Demonstrates transparency and customer-centric business approach

title: Future of TV Briefing: How Paramount’s and Warner Bros. Discovery’s ad tech stacks stack up
description: This week’s Future of TV Briefing breaks down Paramount’s and Warner Bros. Discovery’s ad tech stacks now that the companies seem set (finally) to combine.
summary_ko: 이번 주 Future of TV 브리핑은 마침내 합병이 확정된 것으로 보이는 파라마운트와 워너 브라더스 디스커버리의 광고 기술 스택을 분석했습니다. 두 회사의 애드테크 스택이 어떻게 비교되는지 상세히 다뤘습니다. 합병 후 통합된 광고 기술 플랫폼의 모습을 전망했습니다.
summary_en: This week's Future of TV Briefing analyzed the ad tech stacks of Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery as their merger appears finally set. The briefing detailed how the two companies' ad tech stacks compare. It forecasted the integrated advertising technology platform after the merger.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 미디어 대기업들의 통합으로 인한 광고 생태계 변화에 대비하여 광고 전략과 파트너십을 재검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should review their advertising strategies and partnerships in preparation for ecosystem changes due to major media company consolidations.
key_points: Analysis of Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery's ad tech stacks
Companies appear set to finally combine operations
Comparison of their respective advertising technology platforms

title: Omnicom Media North America CEO Ralph Pardo on integration and disintermediation
description: Ralph Pardo, CEO of Omnicom Media North America, explained how far along the holding company is in absorbing IPG's agency brands, as well as why they were kept alive.
summary_ko: 옴니컴 미디어 북미 CEO 랄프 파르도가 IPG 에이전시 브랜드 흡수 과정과 이들을 유지한 이유를 설명했습니다. 홀딩 컴퍼니의 통합과 탈중개화에 대한 입장을 밝혔습니다. IPG 브랜드들이 계속 유지되는 전략적 배경을 제시했습니다.
summary_en: Omnicom Media North America CEO Ralph Pardo explained the process of absorbing IPG agency brands and why they were kept alive. He shared his stance on holding company integration and disintermediation. Pardo provided strategic background on why IPG brands continue to be maintained.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 에이전시 통합 트렌드를 주시하며 다양한 브랜드 포트폴리오를 가진 통합 에이전시와의 협력 기회를 모색해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should monitor agency consolidation trends and explore collaboration opportunities with integrated agencies that have diverse brand portfolios.
key_points: Omnicom's progress in absorbing IPG agency brands
Strategic decision to keep IPG brands alive rather than eliminate them
Discussion of integration and disintermediation in holding companies

title: [AINews] Anthropic @ $19B ARR, Qwen team leaves, Gemini and GPT bump up fast models
description: a quiet day
summary_ko: Anthropic이 190억 달러 ARR을 기록했으며, Qwen 팀이 떠나고 Gemini와 GPT가 빠른 모델로 업그레이드되었습니다. AI 업계에서 조용한 하루였지만 주요 기업들의 성장과 변화가 계속되고 있습니다. 원문에서 구체적인 세부사항은 확인되지 않음.
summary_en: Anthropic reached $19B ARR while the Qwen team departed and Gemini and GPT upgraded to faster models. Despite being described as a quiet day in AI, major companies continue showing growth and transformation. Specific details about these developments are not confirmed in the source.
so_what_ko: AI 모델 성능 향상과 기업 재편은 D2C 브랜드의 고객 서비스와 개인화 전략에 새로운 기회를 제공할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: AI model improvements and industry reshuffling could present new opportunities for D2C brands to enhance customer service and personalization strategies.
key_points: Anthropic achieves significant $19B ARR milestone
Major AI teams experiencing organizational changes
Leading AI models getting performance upgrades

description: Here are the answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword for March 4.
summary_ko: 뉴욕타임스 미니 크로스워드 퍼즐의 3월 4일 답안이 제공되었습니다. CNET에서 게임 관련 콘텐츠로 퍼즐 해답을 공유하고 있습니다. 원문에서 구체적인 답안 내용은 확인되지 않음.
summary_en: The New York Times Mini Crossword answers for March 4 have been provided. CNET is sharing puzzle solutions as part of their gaming content. Specific answer details are not confirmed in the source.
so_what_ko: 퍼즐 게임 콘텐츠는 D2C 브랜드의 고객 참여도 향상을 위한 게이미피케이션 전략에 활용될 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Puzzle game content can be leveraged for D2C brand gamification strategies to boost customer engagement.
key_points: NYT Mini Crossword solutions provided for March 4
Gaming content used for audience engagement

title: Today's NYT Connections: Sports Edition Hints and Answers for March 4, #527
description: Here are hints and the answers for the NYT Connections: Sports Edition puzzle for March 4, No. 527.
summary_ko: 뉴욕타임스 커넥션스 스포츠 에디션의 3월 4일 힌트와 답안이 제공되었습니다. 527번째 퍼즐에 대한 해답 가이드가 공유되고 있습니다. 원문에서 구체적인 힌트와 답안은 확인되지 않음.

so_what_en: Sports-themed puzzles can inform D2C brands' targeted content strategies for sports fan demographics.
key_points: NYT Connections Sports Edition puzzle #527 solutions provided
Sports-themed puzzle content for audience engagement

summary_ko: 뉴욕타임스 스트랜즈 퍼즐의 3월 4일 힌트와 답안이 제공되었습니다. 731번째 퍼즐에 대한 도움말과 해답이 공유되고 있습니다. 원문에서 구체적인 내용은 확인되지 않음.
summary_en: NYT Strands puzzle hints and answers for March 4, #731, have been provided. Help and solutions for this puzzle variant are being shared. Specific content details are not confirmed in the source.

Alternative puzzle format for content variety

description: Here are some hints and the answers for the NYT Connections puzzle for March 4 #997
summary_ko: 뉴욕타임스 커넥션스 퍼즐의 3월 4일 힌트와 답안이 제공되었습니다. 997번째 퍼즐에 대한 해답 가이드가 공유되고 있습니다. 원문에서 구체적인 힌트와 답안 내용은 확인되지 않음.

so_what_en: Daily puzzle content can be used as a retention strategy for D2C brands to create consistent daily touchpoints with customers.
key_points: NYT Connections puzzle #997 solutions provided
Daily content format for regular engagement

title: Merrell’s first global brand platform looks to redefine the outdoors
description: The footwear brand is pitching nature as a refuge for consumers who are overwhelmed by the pace and digital demands of modern life.
summary_ko: 메렐(Merrell)이 현대인들의 디지털 피로감에 대응하여 자연을 피난처로 제시하는 첫 글로벌 브랜드 플랫폼을 론칭했습니다. 이는 빠른 속도와 디지털 요구사항에 압도된 소비자들을 타겟으로 합니다. 아웃도어 개념을 재정의하는 새로운 브랜딩 전략을 시도하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Merrell has launched its first global brand platform positioning nature as a refuge for consumers overwhelmed by modern life's pace and digital demands. The footwear brand is targeting customers experiencing digital fatigue and information overload. This represents a strategic attempt to redefine what the outdoors means in contemporary marketing.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 디지털 피로감을 겪는 소비자들에게 '디지털 디톡스'와 웰빙을 강조하는 브랜딩 전략을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should consider wellness-focused branding that addresses digital fatigue and positions their products as solutions for modern life stress.
key_points: First global brand platform launch by Merrell
Targets consumers overwhelmed by digital demands
Positions nature as refuge from modern life pace
Attempts to redefine outdoor category positioning

title: Is On’s muted guidance the sign of a ‘dwindling’ brand?
description: One analyst thinks so, though others brushed it off as the activewear brand scored 30% net sales growth in 2025 and record high Q4 margins.
summary_ko: 온(On) 브랜드가 2026년 전망을 보수적으로 제시하면서 일부 애널리스트들이 브랜드 쇠퇴 가능성을 제기했습니다. 하지만 2025년 30% 순매출 증가와 4분기 기록적 마진을 달성했습니다. 다른 전문가들은 이러한 우려를 일축하며 여전히 강력한 성장세를 보인다고 평가했습니다.
summary_en: On brand's conservative 2026 guidance prompted some analysts to question potential brand decline, though the activewear company achieved 30% net sales growth in 2025. The brand also recorded record-high Q4 margins despite the muted outlook. Other analysts dismissed decline concerns, citing continued strong performance metrics.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 보수적 전망 발표 시 시장 반응을 신중히 관리하고, 강력한 실적 데이터로 브랜드 신뢰도를 유지해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must carefully manage market communications around conservative guidance while leveraging strong performance data to maintain brand confidence.
key_points: Conservative 2026 guidance sparked analyst concerns
30% net sales growth achieved in 2025
Record high Q4 margins reported
Mixed analyst opinions on brand trajectory

title: Memory shortage looms over Best Buy’s prospects
description: Data centers are hoarding computing memory, which is poised to push up prices on consumer electronics at a time of already soft demand.
summary_ko: 베스트바이의 전망에 메모리 부족 현상이 악영향을 미치고 있습니다. 데이터센터들이 컴퓨팅 메모리를 독점하면서 소비자 전자제품 가격 상승이 예상됩니다. 이미 수요가 약한 상황에서 추가적인 가격 압박이 우려되고 있습니다.
summary_en: Memory shortages are casting a shadow over Best Buy's business prospects as data centers hoard computing memory supplies. This situation is expected to drive up consumer electronics prices at an already challenging time. The shortage comes amid already soft consumer demand for electronics products.
so_what_ko: D2C 전자제품 브랜드들은 메모리 부족으로 인한 비용 상승을 대비해 공급망 다각화와 가격 전략을 재검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C electronics brands should diversify supply chains and reassess pricing strategies to manage memory shortage-driven cost increases.
key_points: Data centers hoarding computing memory supplies
Consumer electronics price increases expected
Soft demand environment adds pressure
Supply chain disruption affecting retail prospects

title: Target’s earnings lag in the holiday quarter
description: The retailer's net sales declined again, with drops across multiple merchandise categories. However, Target expects gains during fiscal 2026 and tapped a chief brand officer.
summary_ko: 타겟의 홀리데이 분기 실적이 부진했으며 순매출이 다시 감소했습니다. 여러 상품 카테고리에서 매출 하락이 발생했습니다. 하지만 회사는 2026 회계연도 성장을 예상하며 최고 브랜드 책임자를 새로 임명했습니다.
summary_en: Target's holiday quarter earnings disappointed with declining net sales across multiple merchandise categories. The retailer experienced drops in various product segments during the critical shopping season. However, Target anticipates gains in fiscal 2026 and has appointed a new chief brand officer.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 홀리데이 시즌 실적 부진 시 브랜딩 전략 강화와 새로운 리더십 임명을 통해 회복 전략을 수립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should strengthen branding strategies and consider leadership changes to drive recovery following poor holiday performance.
key_points: Holiday quarter net sales declined
Multiple merchandise categories showed drops
Fiscal 2026 growth expectations maintained
New chief brand officer appointed

title: Stripe’s slower view of agentic commerce
description: The processing giant, like some other digital commerce specialists, sees agent-enabled shopping evolving at a measured pace.
summary_ko: 스트라이프가 에이전틱 커머스(AI 에이전트 기반 쇼핑)의 발전 속도를 보수적으로 전망했습니다. 다른 디지털 커머스 전문업체들과 마찬가지로 점진적 발전을 예상한다고 밝혔습니다. 결제 처리 대기업으로서 AI 쇼핑 에이전트 도입에 신중한 접근을 취하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Stripe has taken a measured view on the evolution of agentic commerce, expecting agent-enabled shopping to develop at a gradual pace. The payment processing giant joins other digital commerce specialists in adopting a cautious approach to AI shopping agents. This represents a more conservative outlook on AI-driven commerce transformation.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 쇼핑 에이전트 도입 시 급진적 변화보다는 점진적 통합을 고려하며 실용적 접근법을 택해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should adopt practical, gradual approaches to AI agent integration rather than rushing into rapid transformation of shopping experiences.
key_points: Stripe expects measured pace for agentic commerce
Digital commerce specialists taking cautious approach
AI shopping agents evolving gradually
Conservative outlook on commerce transformation

title: Payment Friction Wins in Africa
description:
In Africa, providing payment details online is a leap of faith. Consumers need proof of the product and company.
The post Payment Friction Wins in Africa appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
summary_ko: 아프리카에서는 온라인 결제 시 소비자들이 제품과 회사에 대한 신뢰를 필요로 한다. 온라인으로 결제 정보를 제공하는 것이 큰 도약이며 소비자들은 증거를 원한다. 결제 과정의 마찰이 오히려 신뢰 구축에 도움이 되는 상황이다.
summary_en: In Africa, consumers require proof of both the product and company before making online payments. Providing payment details online represents a significant leap of faith for African consumers. Payment friction actually helps build trust in this market context.
so_what_ko: 아프리카 시장 진출 시 결제 단계에서의 투명성과 신뢰 구축이 전환율 향상에 더 중요할 수 있다.
so_what_en: For African market entry, transparency and trust-building in payment processes may be more important than streamlined checkout for conversion optimization.
key_points: African consumers need proof before online payments
Payment friction can build trust in emerging markets
Cultural context affects payment preferences

title: Amazon rolls out AI “canvas” to help marketplace sellers analyze data
description:
Amazon has introduced a new artificial intelligence (AI) feature in seller central that it said allows merchants to generate personalized, interactive dashboards combining business data, analytics and recommended actions in real time. Amazon calls the feature its “canvas” experience. It integrates AI-powered chat with dynamic visual workspaces that adapt as sellers ask questions about sales […]
The post Amazon rolls out AI “canvas” to help marketplace sellers analyze data appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 아마존이 마켓플레이스 셀러들을 위한 AI 기반 '캔버스' 기능을 출시했다. 이 기능은 비즈니스 데이터, 분석, 추천 액션을 실시간으로 결합한 개인화된 대시보드를 생성한다. AI 채팅과 동적 시각화 작업공간을 통합하여 셀러들의 질문에 따라 적응한다.
summary_en: Amazon has launched an AI-powered 'canvas' feature for marketplace sellers in Seller Central. The feature generates personalized, interactive dashboards combining business data, analytics and recommended actions in real-time. It integrates AI-powered chat with dynamic visual workspaces that adapt as sellers ask questions.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들도 AI 기반 데이터 분석 대시보드를 통해 실시간 비즈니스 인사이트를 얻고 의사결정 속도를 높일 수 있다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage AI-powered analytics dashboards to gain real-time business insights and accelerate decision-making processes.
key_points: AI-powered interactive dashboards for sellers
Real-time data analysis with chat interface
Personalized recommendations and actions
Dynamic visual workspaces

title: Xometry tightens grip on AI sourcing
description:
Xometry is expanding the artificial intelligence (AI) at the core of its online manufacturing marketplace. It’s introducing new lead-time prediction and personalized pricing models designed to make custom part sourcing faster and more predictable for enterprise buyers. The company said March 3 that its new enterprise machining lead time prediction model and upgraded dynamic pricing […]
The post Xometry tightens grip on AI sourcing appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 제조업 온라인 마켓플레이스 Xometry가 AI 소싱 기능을 확장했다. 새로운 리드타임 예측 모델과 개인화된 가격 책정 모델을 도입하여 기업 구매자들의 맞춤형 부품 조달을 더 빠르고 예측 가능하게 만들었다. 기업용 가공 리드타임 예측 모델과 업그레이드된 동적 가격 책정을 특징으로 한다.
summary_en: Manufacturing marketplace Xometry has expanded AI capabilities at its core with new lead-time prediction and personalized pricing models. The enhancements are designed to make custom part sourcing faster and more predictable for enterprise buyers. The company introduced enterprise machining lead-time prediction and upgraded dynamic pricing models.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들도 AI 기반 예측 모델을 활용해 공급망 리드타임을 정확히 예측하고 고객에게 더 나은 배송 약속을 제공할 수 있다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can utilize AI prediction models to accurately forecast supply chain lead-times and provide better delivery promises to customers.
key_points: AI-powered lead-time prediction models
Personalized pricing for enterprise buyers
Dynamic pricing optimization
Custom manufacturing marketplace

title: Henry Schein advances global ecommerce rollout
description:
Henry Schein is moving into the next phase of its global ecommerce expansion, completing key North American deployments of its consolidated online ordering platform as part of a broader effort to strengthen digital sales and improve operating efficiency. On its Q4 earnings call Feb. 24, CEO Stanley Bergman said implementation of the company’s global ecommerce […]
The post Henry Schein advances global ecommerce rollout appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: Henry Schein이 글로벌 이커머스 확장의 다음 단계로 진입하며 통합 온라인 주문 플랫폼의 북미 배포를 완료했다. 디지털 판매 강화와 운영 효율성 개선을 위한 광범위한 노력의 일환이다. CEO Stanley Bergman은 Q4 실적 발표에서 글로벌 이커머스 구현에 대해 언급했다.
summary_en: Henry Schein is advancing to the next phase of its global ecommerce expansion, completing key North American deployments of its consolidated online ordering platform. This is part of a broader effort to strengthen digital sales and improve operating efficiency. CEO Stanley Bergman discussed the global ecommerce implementation during the Q4 earnings call.
so_what_ko: 통합된 글로벌 이커머스 플랫폼 구축을 통해 운영 효율성을 높이고 시장별 맞춤화된 디지털 경험을 제공할 수 있다.
so_what_en: Building unified global ecommerce platforms can improve operational efficiency while enabling market-specific digital experiences.
key_points: Global ecommerce platform consolidation
North American deployment completion
Focus on digital sales strengthening
Operational efficiency improvements

title: Where to Start with AI: A Practical Guide for GTM Teams
description: Over the past year, I‘ve had hundreds of conversations with business leaders about AI. The pattern is always the same. They’re not short on tools or ambition. They're struggling with where to get started and how to get value.
summary_ko: 비즈니스 리더들이 AI 도구와 야심은 부족하지 않지만 어디서부터 시작해야 하고 어떻게 가치를 창출할지에 대해 어려움을 겪고 있다. GTM 팀을 위한 실용적인 AI 시작 가이드가 제시되었다. 수백 번의 비즈니스 리더들과의 대화에서 나타난 공통적인 패턴이다.
summary_en: Business leaders have plenty of AI tools and ambition but struggle with where to start and how to create value. A practical guide for GTM teams has been presented to address this common challenge. This pattern emerged from hundreds of conversations with business leaders about AI implementation.
so_what_ko: D2C 팀들도 AI 도입 시 명확한 시작점과 가치 창출 방법론을 정의하여 효과적인 AI 활용 전략을 수립해야 한다.
so_what_en: D2C teams should define clear starting points and value creation methodologies to develop effective AI utilization strategies.
key_points: Common struggle with AI implementation starting points
Focus on value creation over tool acquisition
Practical guidance for go-to-market teams
Pattern from hundreds of business conversations

title: Google’s latest Pixel drop allows Gemini to order groceries for you and more
description:
Google is adding several new features to Pixel phones with its latest March update, including the ability for its Gemini AI assistant to do things for you, like order groceries or book a ride. This feature, which was first shown off during Samsung's Unpacked event last week, is rolling out now to the Pixel 10, Pixel 10 Pro, and Pixel 10 Pro XL.
With Gemini's new agentic feature, you can ask the assistant to complete work on your behalf inside "select" apps, including Uber and Grubhub. It will work in the background while you use your phone, but Google notes that you can supervise or interrupt its work at any time. This feature will also be  …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 구글이 픽셀 폰의 3월 업데이트에서 제미나이 AI 어시스턴트가 사용자 대신 식료품 주문이나 승차 예약 등의 작업을 수행할 수 있는 새로운 기능을 추가했습니다. 이 에이전틱 기능은 우버, 그럽허브 등 선택된 앱에서 백그라운드로 작동하며 사용자가 언제든지 감독하거나 중단할 수 있습니다. 현재 픽셀 10, 픽셀 10 프로, 픽셀 10 프로 XL에서 사용 가능합니다.
summary_en: Google has added new features to Pixel phones in its March update, including the ability for its Gemini AI assistant to perform tasks like ordering groceries or booking rides on behalf of users. This agentic feature works in the background with select apps including Uber and Grubhub, while allowing users to supervise or interrupt its work at any time. The feature is now rolling out to Pixel 10, Pixel 10 Pro, and Pixel 10 Pro XL devices.
so_what_ko: AI 어시스턴트가 실제 구매 행동을 대행하는 시대가 도래하면서 D2C 브랜드는 AI 최적화된 쇼핑 경험과 음성/텍스트 기반 주문 시스템을 개발해야 합니다.
so_what_en: As AI assistants begin performing actual purchase actions, D2C brands must develop AI-optimized shopping experiences and voice/text-based ordering systems to capture this new autonomous commerce trend.
key_points: Google Gemini can now autonomously order groceries and book services through apps
Feature works in background while allowing user supervision and interruption
Available on latest Pixel 10 series devices
Represents shift toward autonomous AI commerce agents

title: How the experts figure out what’s real in the age of deepfakes
description:
You can help fight the spread of fake news by following these newsroom tips. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images	

In the days that followed the US and Israel's joint military strike on Iran on Saturday, floods of images and videos that supposedly document the war have appeared online. Some are old or depict unrelated conflicts, are made or manipulated with AI, and in some cases, are actually taken from military-themed video games like War Thunder. 
With misinformation spreading like wildfire, many people have placed their trust in reputable digital investigators. Organizations like The New York Times, Indicator, and Bellingcat have extensive verification procedures to avoid publishing synthetic or misleading content.  "Audiences can turn to trusted, in …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 딥페이크 시대에 가짜 뉴스 확산에 맞서 뉴욕타임즈, 벨링캣 등 신뢰할 수 있는 디지털 조사 기관들이 광범위한 검증 절차를 통해 합성 또는 오해의 소지가 있는 콘텐츠 게시를 방지하고 있습니다. 최근 이란 관련 군사 공격 이후 온라인에 나타난 많은 이미지와 동영상들이 AI로 조작되거나 게임 영상인 경우가 있어 전문가들의 검증이 중요해졌습니다. 일반인들도 신뢰할 수 있는 뉴스룸의 팁을 따라 가짜 뉴스 확산 방지에 기여할 수 있습니다.
summary_en: In the deepfake era, trusted digital investigation organizations like The New York Times and Bellingcat use extensive verification procedures to avoid publishing synthetic or misleading content. Following recent military strikes on Iran, many images and videos appearing online have been AI-manipulated or taken from video games, highlighting the importance of expert verification. General audiences can help fight fake news spread by following newsroom verification tips.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 딥페이크와 AI 조작 콘텐츠가 브랜드 신뢰도에 미칠 수 있는 위험을 인지하고 콘텐츠 진위 검증 시스템을 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must recognize the risks deepfakes and AI-manipulated content pose to brand credibility and establish content authenticity verification systems.
key_points: Trusted organizations use extensive verification procedures for content authenticity
AI-generated and manipulated content spreading rapidly during major events
Professional verification methods becoming critical for content credibility
General public can contribute to fighting misinformation with proper techniques

title: Xiaomi, unlike Google and Samsung, thinks camera hardware comes first
description:
Xiaomi’s new Leica Leitzphone has new hardware tricks including continuous zoom and a LOFIC sensor. | Photo: Dominic Preston / The Verge	

When it launched the 17 and 17 Ultra in Europe on Saturday, Xiaomi bucked an industry trend: it didn't really talk about AI all that much. And it really didn't talk about AI when it showed off the two phones' cameras, including a special edition 17 Ultra co-created with Leica. According to Angus Ng, the company's director of communications and public relations, that's no mistake.
"We're still currently focusing on what is the limitation of hardware," Ng told me at MWC 2026, when I asked why its photography approach seemed so different to Google and Samsung's recent Pixel 10A and Galaxy S26 launches. "If it really comes to a point where we c …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 샤오미가 17과 17 울트라를 유럽에서 출시하면서 구글과 삼성과 달리 AI보다는 하드웨어에 중점을 두는 차별화된 접근법을 보였습니다. 라이카와 공동 개발한 특별판 17 울트라를 포함해 카메라 기능을 소개할 때도 AI 기술보다는 하드웨어의 한계를 우선 극복하겠다는 전략을 제시했습니다. 샤오미 커뮤니케이션 디렉터는 하드웨어의 한계가 해결되지 않으면 AI도 의미가 없다고 설명했습니다.
summary_en: Xiaomi bucked industry trends when launching the 17 and 17 Ultra in Europe by focusing on hardware rather than AI, unlike Google and Samsung's recent approaches. When showcasing camera features including a special Leica co-created 17 Ultra edition, the company emphasized overcoming hardware limitations before AI implementation. Xiaomi's communications director explained that AI becomes meaningless without first solving hardware constraints.
so_what_ko: 하드웨어 우선 접근법은 D2C 브랜드가 AI 마케팅 과열 속에서도 실질적인 제품 품질과 기능에 집중해야 함을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: The hardware-first approach suggests D2C brands should focus on tangible product quality and functionality despite AI marketing hype.
key_points: Xiaomi prioritizes hardware improvements over AI features in new phone launch
Company takes different approach from Google and Samsung's AI-focused strategies
Leica partnership emphasizes premium hardware capabilities
Philosophy emphasizes solving hardware limitations before AI implementation

title: Why is SpaceX going public?
description:
I am excited about the SpaceX IPO for all the reasons investors shouldn't be. Maybe it'll be a real marquee moment for Silicon Valley, but I see the potential for a shitshow. After all, more than a decade ago, Musk said that SpaceX going public before going to Mars would be bad for the company.
Are private markets tapped out on cash to fund SpaceX ambitions? Elon Musk has been very clear about his feelings on publicly traded companies. Specifically: He doesn't like them! 

"I am hesitant to foist being public on SpaceX, especially given the long term nature of our mission."

In 2013, Musk sent an email to SpaceX, which his biographer Ashlee …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 스페이스X의 IPO 계획에 대한 분석 기사로, 10년 전 머스크가 화성 진출 전 상장은 회사에 해가 될 것이라고 했던 발언과 대조됩니다. 저자는 투자자들이 흥미로워하지 않을 이유로 이번 IPO에 흥미를 느낀다고 밝혔습니다. 사모시장의 자금이 고갈되어 스페이스X의 야망을 뒷받침하기 어려워졌을 가능성이 제기됩니다.
summary_en: The article analyzes SpaceX's IPO plans, contrasting with Musk's statement from over a decade ago that going public before Mars missions would be bad for the company. The author expresses excitement about the IPO for reasons investors shouldn't be interested, seeing potential for problems. The piece questions whether private markets are running out of cash to fund SpaceX's ambitious projects.
so_what_ko: 대형 기술 기업의 IPO 동향은 D2C 브랜드의 자금 조달 환경과 투자자 관심사 변화를 파악하는 중요한 지표가 될 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Major tech company IPO trends can serve as important indicators for D2C brands to understand funding environment changes and shifting investor interests.
key_points: SpaceX considering IPO despite Musk's previous opposition to public trading
Author sees potential risks in the IPO that excite rather than concern them
Questions raised about private market funding capacity for ambitious projects
Musk historically critical of public company constraints on long-term missions

title: Chili’s CMO promoted to translate winning playbook to Brinker’s other brand
description: George Felix will lead marketing for both Chili’s and Maggiano’s Little Italy, which has lagged behind its sister brand’s eye-popping run of sales growth.
summary_ko: 칠리스의 CMO 조지 펠릭스가 승진하여 칠리스와 마지아노스 리틀 이탈리아 두 브랜드의 마케팅을 총괄하게 되었습니다. 이는 칠리스의 성공적인 마케팅 전략을 자매 브랜드인 마지아노스에도 적용하기 위한 조치입니다. 마지아노스는 칠리스의 눈부신 매출 성장에 비해 상대적으로 부진한 성과를 보이고 있습니다.
summary_en: Chili's CMO George Felix has been promoted to lead marketing for both Chili's and Maggiano's Little Italy brands. This move aims to translate Chili's successful marketing playbook to its sister brand Maggiano's. Maggiano's has been lagging behind Chili's impressive sales growth performance.
so_what_ko: 성공한 브랜드의 마케팅 전략을 다른 브랜드로 확장하는 것은 D2C 기업의 포트폴리오 확장 시 고려할 수 있는 효과적인 전략입니다.
so_what_en: Extending successful brand marketing strategies to other brands is an effective approach D2C companies can consider when expanding their portfolio.
key_points: Chili's CMO promoted to oversee marketing for two restaurant brands
Strategy aims to replicate Chili's successful marketing approach at Maggiano's
Maggiano's performance has lagged behind Chili's strong sales growth
Cross-brand marketing leadership approach within restaurant group

title: Why Papa Johns is going back to basics in latest marketing shakeup
description: The pizza chain has reestablished local marketing co-ops and plans to launch a creative platform in collaboration with new AOR Leo Chicago.
summary_ko: 파파존스가 마케팅 전략을 재편하며 지역 마케팅 협동조합을 재구축했습니다. 새로운 광고대행사 Leo Chicago와 협력하여 창의적 플랫폼을 출시할 예정입니다. 이는 브랜드가 기본으로 돌아가는 마케팅 접근법의 일환입니다.
summary_en: Papa Johns has restructured its marketing strategy by reestablishing local marketing cooperatives. The pizza chain plans to launch a creative platform in collaboration with new agency of record Leo Chicago. This represents a back-to-basics approach in their latest marketing shakeup.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 지역화된 마케팅 접근법과 창의적 협업을 통해 고객 접점을 강화할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can strengthen customer touchpoints through localized marketing approaches and creative collaborations.
key_points: Reestablishment of local marketing cooperatives
Partnership with Leo Chicago as new AOR
Back-to-basics marketing strategy approach

title: Heineken looks to preserve Irish pub culture with documentary
description: “The Pub That Refused To Die” comes as more brands invest in entertainment to gain an edge in the fight for consumer attention.
summary_ko: 하이네켄이 아일랜드 펍 문화를 보존하기 위해 다큐멘터리를 제작했습니다. '죽기를 거부한 펍(The Pub That Refused To Die)'이라는 제목의 이 작품은 브랜드 엔터테인먼트 투자 증가 추세를 반영합니다. 소비자 관심을 끌기 위한 경쟁에서 우위를 점하려는 브랜드들의 노력이 증가하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Heineken has produced a documentary to preserve Irish pub culture titled 'The Pub That Refused To Die'. This reflects the growing trend of brands investing in entertainment content. More brands are using entertainment as a strategy to gain an edge in the fight for consumer attention.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 엔터테인먼트 콘텐츠를 통해 브랜드 스토리텔링과 문화적 연결점을 강화할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can strengthen brand storytelling and cultural connections through entertainment content investments.
key_points: Documentary about Irish pub culture preservation
Brand investment in entertainment content
Strategy to capture consumer attention through storytelling

title: The era of data dominance is over, and it didn’t last very long
description:
Data was the new oil, but context is the new refinery. Because without a refinery, oil is just a smelly, toxic mess that often brings more harm than good. 
The post The era of data dominance is over, and it didn’t last very long appeared first on MarTech.
summary_ko: 데이터 지배 시대가 종료되었으며, 이는 그리 오래가지 않았습니다. 데이터가 새로운 석유였다면, 맥락이 새로운 정제소라고 할 수 있습니다. 정제소 없이는 석유가 단지 악취나는 독성 물질에 불과하여 종종 득보다 해가 더 크기 때문입니다.
summary_en: The era of data dominance has ended, and it didn't last very long. While data was the new oil, context is now the new refinery. Without a refinery, oil is just a smelly, toxic mess that often brings more harm than good.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 단순한 데이터 수집보다는 맥락적 이해와 해석 능력에 투자해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should invest in contextual understanding and interpretation capabilities rather than just data collection.
key_points: End of the data dominance era
Context as the new refinery for data value
Data without context can be harmful rather than beneficial

title: Google details how its on-Google checkout works
description:
New guidance explains how the Universal Commerce Protocol powers AI-driven checkout across its platforms.
The post Google details how its on-Google checkout works appeared first on MarTech.
summary_ko: 구글이 자사 플랫폼에서의 체크아웃 시스템 작동 방식을 상세히 공개했습니다. 새로운 가이드라인은 범용 상거래 프로토콜이 어떻게 AI 기반 체크아웃을 구글 플랫폼 전반에서 지원하는지 설명합니다. 이는 구글의 AI 기반 상거래 생태계 확장을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Google has detailed how its on-Google checkout system works across its platforms. New guidance explains how the Universal Commerce Protocol powers AI-driven checkout functionality. This demonstrates Google's expansion of its AI-powered commerce ecosystem.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 구글의 AI 기반 체크아웃 시스템을 활용하여 구매 전환율을 향상시킬 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage Google's AI-powered checkout system to improve purchase conversion rates.
key_points: Google's on-platform checkout system details revealed
Universal Commerce Protocol powering AI-driven checkout
Integration across Google's platform ecosystem

title: Automation is marketing’s fastest path to AI returns
description:
Automation levels directly correlate with AI returns. Without structural change, marketing’s AI spend may amplify old inefficiencies.
The post Automation is marketing’s fastest path to AI returns appeared first on MarTech.
summary_ko: 자동화가 마케팅에서 AI 수익을 얻는 가장 빠른 경로라고 분석되었습니다. 자동화 수준은 AI 수익과 직접적으로 상관관계가 있습니다. 구조적 변화 없이는 마케팅의 AI 투자가 기존의 비효율성을 증폭시킬 수 있습니다.
summary_en: Automation has been identified as marketing's fastest path to AI returns. Automation levels directly correlate with AI returns in marketing initiatives. Without structural change, marketing's AI spending may amplify existing inefficiencies rather than solve them.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 투자 전에 마케팅 자동화 기반을 먼저 구축하여 효율성을 극대화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should establish marketing automation foundations before AI investments to maximize efficiency gains.
key_points: Automation as fastest path to AI marketing returns
Direct correlation between automation levels and AI ROI
Risk of amplifying inefficiencies without structural change
